A committed team of Emergency Care Our commitment is to offer around-the-clock Facilities Available At Camry Hospitals Our Specialties General Medicine Obstetrics & Gynaecology Paediatric Surgery Orthopaedics Neurosurgery Nephrology & Dialysis View All About Camry Hospitals Camry Hospitals at Bannerghatta Road is a leading healthcare destination for multi-specialty healthcare. We combine world-class facilities with a dedicated team of doctors, nurses, technicians and paramedical staff. Our Corporate Surgical Unit is equipped with advanced medical technology, including some of the latest innovations in India and is located in the largest residential area of South Bangalore. It primarily affects the prostate gland, which is part of the male reproductive system.… Previous Next FAQ Frequently Asked Questions How can I schedule an appointment at Camry Hospitals? To schedule an appointment, you can call our dedicated appointment line, visit our website, or use our online appointment booking system for your convenience. Are emergency services available at Camry Hospitals? Yes, Camry Hospitals is equipped to handle medical emergencies 24/7. Our emergency department is staffed with skilled healthcare professionals to provide prompt and effective care. How can I access my medical records from Camry Hospitals? Patients can access their medical records through our secure online patient portal. Instructions for accessing and navigating the portal are provided during the registration process. Does Camry Hospitals accept insurance plans? We work with a variety of insurance providers. You can check our website or contact our billing department to verify if your insurance plan is accepted.
